name: rag
description: Knowledge base RAG with approval workflow. Store business rules, design decisions, and documentation in a searchable knowledge base with categories and tags.

interface.longDescription: Store and search knowledge entries: business rules, design decisions, architecture notes, and documentation. Organize with categories and tags. Review and approve before entries become searchable.
defaultPrompt: Store this knowledge: orders over 1000 need manager approval
Search the knowledge base for authentication rules
